also the father of {{ill|Yatamiko no mikoto|ja|八玉彦命|12=draft|12=draft}} ==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== . --> {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:qq]]{{citation needed|Takeuioki no mikoto}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:ion tier 6]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Takeuioki no mikoto]] [[Category:Is a descendant of Watatsumi.]] [[Category:is a descendant of [[Watatsumi]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Takeuioki no mikoto]] [[ja:武位起命]] [[sn:akeuioki no mikoto]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox deity|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|parents={{ill|Hoori|WD=Q1051960}}; {{ill|Furutama-no-Mikoto|WD=Q106241380}}|offspring={{ill|Saonetsuhiko|WD=Q11120574}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:30, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:47, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=All of this seems rather questionable. But I think Furutama is his mother and [[Hoori]] is his father[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 14:30, 14 May 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=wikidata entry [[da:d:Q134845057]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takeuioki no mikoto''' (武位起命) is a grandson of {{ill|Watatsumi|en|Watatsumi|WD=Q1474187|lt=Watatsumi}}, son of {{ill|Furutama|ja|布留多摩命|en|draft:Furutama-no-Mikoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Furutama|fr|Furutama|lt=Furutama-no-Mikoto|complete=true|12=draft|12=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}} and father of {{ill|Saonetsuhiko|fr||ja|椎根津彦|simple|User:Immanuelle/Saonetsuhiko|lt=Saonetsuhiko|lt2=珍彦命|complete=true|12=draft|12=draft}}<ref name="Saonetsuhiko" /><ref name="gov" /><ref name="hyakka">{{ill|Matoshi Suzuki|ja|鈴木眞年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{nihongo|Hyakka Keizu Kou|百家系図稿}}</ref> He was also the father of {{ill|Yatamiko-no-Mikoto|ja|八玉彦命|12=draft|12=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References===
. -->
